title: Turkey / Egypt / Brazil — May 2021 travel-and-quitting note
html:
TL;DR

  • Three-line travel bucket-list (Egypt, Turkey, Central America, Brazil) followed by drafted messages for quitting his job at the Dutch Bros roasting facility, commissioning art from "Megan", reaching out to "Caden", and a payment note ("Down 345. 5 payments 349").
  • The quitting letter to "Hello John" is a clean specimen of how Yahir writes uncomfortable messages: gracious framing ("I learned a lot about leadership, styles, culture, and work ethic"), zero burned bridges, no apology for the abrupt timing.
  • "I know my intuition is telling me to leave this job, so that is what I must do" — earliest documented appearance of intuition-as-decision-making-tool, a thread that runs through to 2024 04 27 sam and 2025 09 23 how im scraping by.
  • Egypt was on the list in 2021 — by 2023 he'd actually gone (see 2023 09 06 untitled).

Key quotes

"Hey Kai. I know my intuition is telling me to leave this job, so that is what I must do."

"Hello John, I wish I could have thanked you for everything in person, but today was my last day at the roasting facility... I learned a lot about leadership, styles, culture, and work ethic, which will come in handy in my near future. I am endlessly grateful for the opportunity..."

"Hey Megan, ...have you ever done a commissioned art piece? My mentor is super into supporting young and local artist..."

Why it matters in the graph

  • The Dutch Bros roasting facility job is the manufacturing-intern role on his resume (2025 10 20 quality resume). This note documents the exit.
  • "Megan" commission for a "mentor" — likely brenda aguilera context (mentor figure). The art-as-gift pattern recurs.
  • Egypt-on-the-list-in-2021 → Egypt-actually-visited-in-2023 is a clean 2-year manifestation cycle worth noting against 2023 12 29 vision for big life which formalizes "frequently and candidly manifesting things into existence."

Open questions

  • Who is Kai? (Recurring name across notes — one of his Grants Pass crew.)
  • Did Megan do the commission? Was it for brenda aguilera?
  • Did Turkey ever happen, or was Egypt the substitute Middle-East trip?

Wikilinks

egypt · grants pass or · ford family foundation · brenda aguilera · grants pass teen era
